category_sources: source_facts.description says Convert HTML to PDF or PostScript; official HTMLDOC page calls it HTML Conversion Software and links to HTML, EPUB, and PDF documentation.
display_name_sources: Official project page uses HTMLDOC; source_facts.name is htmldoc.
docs_sources: Official HTMLDOC page links to HTML, EPUB, and PDF documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/michaelrsweet/htmldoc, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official HTMLDOC documentation identify HTML conversion to PDF/PostScript outputs.
